case_title: DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL, INC. VS. ANDREW DIMITROU

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ATTORNEY CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 15063080) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL, INC. HEARING SET FOR APR-28-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100007690) FILED BY RESPONDENT DIMITRIOU, ANDREW
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-14-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, UPON CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT INDICATED THAT IT IS INCLINED TO DENY RESPONDENT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE COURT'S APRIL 28, 2015 ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUNE 3, 2015 JUDGMENT (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473) CONDITIONED ON PAYMENTS OF A CERTAIN AMOUNT WITHIN A CERTAIN TIME PERIOD. MR. MESINA IS TO E-MAIL SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION FOR WHATEVER AMOUNT HAS BEEN EXPENDED BY THURSDAY (12/17/15). MR. SMITH IS TO REPLY BY FIRDAY (12/18/15). THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 18, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION, AND WILL BE DEEMED UNDER SUBMISSION ON THAT DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED ON DECEMBER 18, 2015, RESPONDENT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE COURT'S APRIL 28, 2015 ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUNE 3, 2015 JUDGMENT (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473) - GRANTED. SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN.

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Robert Smith telephone number 415-294-1465 for Defendant.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTORNEY ROBERT SMITH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT ANDREW DIMITRIOU is granted. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Court'S April 28, 2015 Order Confirming Arbitration Award And June 3, 2015 Judgment (Code Of Civil Procedure 473)
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

RESPONDENT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S Motion To Set Aside Court's April 28, 2015 Order Confirming Arbitration Award and June 3, 2015 Judgment (Code Of Civil Procedure 473) - Judge Kahn deems this motion under submission as of the end of day on December 18, 2015.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Court'S April 28, 2015 Order Confirming Arbitration Award And June 3, 2015 Judgment (Code Of Civil Procedure 473)
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Continued To Dec-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Mesina of Law Offices of Dennis G. Mesina telephone number 415-788-8811 for Plaintiff.
Robert Smith of Dimitriou & Associates telephone number 415-294-1465 Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court indicated that it is inclined to deny RESPONDENT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S Motion To Set Aside Court's April 28, 2015 Order Confirming Arbitration Award And June 3, 2015 Judgment (Code Of Civil Procedure 473) conditioned on payments of a certain amount within a certain time period. Mr. Mesina is to e-mail supporting documentation for whatever amount has been expended by Thursday (12/17/15). Mr. Smith is to reply by Firday (12/18/15). The motion is continued to December 18, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 and will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Court'S April 28, 2015 Order Confirming Arbitration Award And June 3, 2015 Judgment (Code Of Civil Procedure 473)
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Continued To Dec-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
RESPONDENT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S Motion To Set Aside Court's April 28, 2015 Order Confirming Arbitration Award And June 3, 2015 Judgment (Code Of Civil Procedure 473) is continued on the court's own motion to December 14, 2015 to be heard concurrently with the hearing on the demurrer to the complaint in Dimitriou & Associates v. De Los Reyes King Street Dental, No. 543724. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Attorney Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dennis G. Mesina, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.788.8811, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER DE LOS REYES KING STREET DENTAL, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Attorney Client Fee Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Counsel to prepare form of judgment. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.
